title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: A video critiquing AGI hype and asserting that current AI models face fundamental mathematical ceilings. It references the Time Hierarchy Theorem, transformer limitations, and chain-of-thought reasoning to argue that autonomous agents accumulate errors and cannot achieve human-level performance.
